projects.title: AI CCTV Gate Attendance & Monitoring System
projects.desc: Hardware-agnostic AI attendance system that connects to existing CCTV/IP cameras and turnstiles for contactless, high-accuracy facial recognition attendance with real-time monitoring.
projects.impact: 99.9% accuracy with anti-spoofing technology, zero-touch payroll sync, and real-time shift integrity alerts across all gates and locations.
projects.fullDescription: A hardware-agnostic AI attendance solution that connects to your existing CCTV/IP cameras and turnstiles for a setup that takes days, not months. Military-grade facial recognition distinguishes between a real face and a photo/video, ensuring zero payroll fraud. Attendance logs push directly to SAP, Oracle, or your HRMS, eliminating manual Excel uploads and data entry errors.
objectives: Deliver 99.9% accurate facial recognition with anti-spoofing technology
Enable zero-touch payroll synchronization with existing HRMS systems
Provide real-time shift monitoring and integrity alerts
Ensure privacy-first architecture with 100% on-premise edge processing
Detect ghost shifts, tailgating, and unauthorized access attempts
Integrate seamlessly with existing CCTV infrastructure without replacement
methodology: Connect AI to existing CCTV/IP cameras and turnstiles
Implement military-grade anti-spoofing facial recognition
Develop direct integration with SAP, Oracle, and HRMS systems
Deploy privacy-first edge processing architecture
Create real-time alert system for shift shortfalls and late arrivals
Build guard app for instant visual verification of clock-ins
Integrate digital visitor management with ID scanning
projects.teamSize: AI engineering team with security and HRMS integration specialists
outcomes: Instant visual verification via guard app
Digital visitor management with searchable cloud logs
features: Live Gate Intelligence with Guard App
targetAudience: Industrial & Manufacturing Units with shift-based workforce
Healthcare Facilities with controlled access needs
Government & Public Sector with security compliance

projects.title: AI CCTV Class & Lab Assistance System
projects.desc: AI-powered classroom and laboratory attendance system using facial recognition with CCTV cameras, eliminating roll calls and enabling automated lab hour tracking.
projects.impact: Zero-touch attendance with seamless timetable integration, real-time notifications, and comprehensive academic management dashboards.
projects.fullDescription: Powered by advanced facial recognition technology, the system identifies students in real time using CCTV or IP cameras. Attendance is marked instantly and securely, eliminating the need for roll calls or biometric touchpoints. The Lab Monitoring System detects entry/exit times to ensure students meet mandatory practical hours without manual logging. Integrates seamlessly with academic timetables and ERP systems.
objectives: Eliminate proxy attendance through real-time facial recognition
Automate lab hour tracking for mandatory practical sessions
Integrate with existing academic timetables and ERPs
Provide real-time attendance reports and notifications
Offer AI insights on participation and discipline trends
Centralize record-keeping across all departments
methodology: Deploy real-time face detection and matching across CCTV feeds
Implement automated entry/exit logging for labs
Integrate with academic timetables and ERP systems
Build customizable dashboards for stakeholders
Create alert system for attendance updates and discrepancies
Develop analytics engine for participation and discipline insights
projects.teamSize: AI and education technology integration team

projects.title: Virtual Office - Gamified 2D Digital Workplace
projects.desc: A 2D interactive digital workplace that recreates a real office environment in a gamified virtual world with avatar-based presence, auto-triggered meetings, integrated task management, and secure cloud storage.
projects.impact: Unified platform combining meetings, tasks, storage, and collaboration with gamified employee engagement and real-time presence awareness.
projects.fullDescription: Virtual Office is a 2D interactive digital workplace that recreates a real office environment in a gamified virtual world. Employees enter the office using avatars, move through cabins, meeting rooms, and common areas, and collaborate in real time - all from a single web platform. The design mirrors a real-world office with individual cabins, team meeting rooms, conference halls, common areas, and admin control zones.
objectives: Create an engaging 2D virtual office with avatar-based presence
Enable room-based automatic meetings without external links
Integrate task assignment and workflow monitoring
Provide secure organizational cloud storage with permissions
Implement leave management with presence integration
Deliver real-time collaboration and transparency
methodology: Design top-down 2D office map with intuitive navigation
Develop customizable 2D avatars with arrow-key movement
Implement room-based auto-triggered audio/video meetings
Build task management system with deadlines and progress tracking
Create secure office drive with folder-level permissions
Integrate leave management with virtual presence status
projects.teamSize: Virtual workplace development team with UX specialists
outcomes: Reduced context switching between multiple tools

projects.title: Virtual Industry - Smart Safety & Workforce Monitoring
projects.desc: A 2D digital twin of industrial environments with real-time employee tracking using UWB bands, automatic in/out time recording, live camera feeds, and fail-safe emergency communication.
projects.impact: Enhanced worker safety through real-time location tracking, automated attendance, and reliable emergency alerts even during network/power failures.
projects.fullDescription: Virtual Industry creates a 2D digital twin of high-risk industrial environments such as mining sites, oil & gas plants, construction zones, and heavy manufacturing units. The system combines camera-based tracking, UWB wearable bands, emergency communication systems, and a virtual map interface to ensure worker safety, productivity, and fast emergency response.
objectives: Create pixel-perfect 2D digital twin of industrial areas
Enable real-time employee location tracking with UWB bands
Automate in-time and out-time recording
Provide live camera feeds from any zone
Deploy smart emergency notice boards with battery backup
Implement restricted area detection with instant alerts
methodology: Design 2D virtual maps matching exact industrial layouts
Integrate UWB wearable bands for accurate location tracking
Deploy smart notice boards with LoRa communication modules
Implement battery backup for emergency reliability
Create restricted zone monitoring with camera integration
Build centralized admin dashboard for complete visibility
projects.teamSize: Industrial IoT and safety systems engineering team
outcomes: Real-time worker location visibility during emergencies
Automated attendance with accurate time logging
Instant emergency alerts with battery backup
Restricted area monitoring with immediate notifications

projects.title: Virtual Campus - Smart AI-Powered Digital Twin for Education
projects.desc: A 2D digital twin of educational campuses with real-time student/staff tracking, automated period-wise attendance, interactive digital notice boards, and restricted area monitoring.
projects.impact: Complete campus visibility with live student tracking, AI attendance, and fail-safe communication during emergencies.
projects.fullDescription: Virtual Campus creates a 2D digital twin of real school campuses, accessible via web and mobile platforms. It gives administrators a live, interactive view of the entire institution, combining AI, IoT, cameras, and low-network communication technologies into a single intelligent system. Cameras and sensors track real-time movement of students and staff with live location displayed directly on the virtual campus map.
objectives: Create pixel-perfect 2D digital twin of educational campuses
Enable real-time student and staff location tracking
Automate period-wise attendance with AI cameras
Deploy interactive digital notice boards in every classroom
Ensure fail-safe emergency communication with battery backup
Monitor restricted areas with instant alerts
methodology: Design 2D virtual campus maps with classrooms, labs, and zones
Integrate AI cameras for automated period-wise attendance
Deploy IoT-based notice boards with P10 LED displays
Implement LoRa communication for low-network reliability
Add battery backup for power failure situations
Create restricted zone monitoring with instant alerts

projects.title: GSIN - Global Student Industry Network
projects.desc: A large-scale 2D interactive virtual learning ecosystem with domain-based blocks, avatar-based presence, auto-triggered meetings, built-in industry tools, and AI+human mentorship.
projects.impact: Transforms static online learning into an interactive, industry-aligned digital campus with real-time collaboration, mentorship, and gamified skill development.
projects.fullDescription: Global Student Industry Network (GSIN) is a large-scale 2D interactive virtual learning ecosystem inspired by the concept of a virtual campus and expanded to a global, industry-aligned level. The platform provides a top-down 2D interactive map-based environment divided into domain-based blocks (Software Development, AI & Data Science, Embedded Systems, Robotics, 3D Design, Industry Research). Students enter using custom avatars, move through blocks, floors, and rooms, and collaborate in real time using built-in tools, meetings, AI support, and mentorship — all within a single integrated system.
objectives: Create domain-based virtual blocks for specialized learning
Enable avatar-based real-time presence and collaboration
Implement auto-triggered room-based audio/video meetings
Integrate built-in industry tools (compilers, simulators, 3D design)
Provide AI assistant and human mentor support per room
Connect LMS features with interactive virtual campus
Host global events, webinars, and hackathons
methodology: Design domain-based blocks with structured floor and room layouts
Develop avatar-based real-time presence system with arrow-key navigation
Implement auto-triggered room-based audio/video meeting functionality
Integrate built-in compilers, simulators, and 3D design tools
Embed AI assistant functionality inside every interactive room
Connect LMS features with virtual campus interactions
Host webinars, hackathons, and industry events inside dedicated virtual spaces
projects.teamSize: Cross-functional team including developers, AI engineers, UI/UX designers, and academic-industry mentors
outcomes: Room-based automatic meetings with contextual collaboration
Integrated coding, simulation, and design tools within platform
AI and human mentorship support system
Unified LMS and live interaction ecosystem
Global event hosting with competitive and collaborative engagement

Industry professionals and mentors providing guidance

projects.title: Stackenzo Retroactive Person Tracking
projects.desc: AI-powered retroactive person tracking platform that enables investigators to identify individuals and trace their movements across multiple CCTV cameras within a defined historical window.
projects.impact: Reduces investigation time from days to minutes with cross-camera movement reconstruction and human-in-the-loop verification.
projects.fullDescription: Stackenzo AI-Powered Retroactive Person Tracking is an intelligent investigation and surveillance analytics platform designed for environments with extensive CCTV infrastructure, such as industrial facilities, warehouses, and large campuses. The platform enables authorized investigators to retrospectively identify a person of interest and automatically trace their movements across multiple cameras within a defined historical window (7-14 days). By combining AI-based video analytics and person re-identification, Stackenzo significantly reduces investigation time while maintaining strict governance, privacy, and compliance standards.
objectives: Enable retroactive person search using reference images
Reconstruct cross-camera movement timelines
Provide time-bound investigative intelligence (7-14 days)
Implement human-in-the-loop verification workflows
Ensure privacy-aware, auditable system usage
Transform recorded video into searchable operational intelligence
methodology: Continuously index people appearing in CCTV footage
Generate AI feature embeddings for person re-identification
Store secure metadata for retroactive search
Build cross-camera movement timelines
Implement role-based access and audit logging
Create human verification workflow for all detections
projects.timeline: Ready for deployment in large-scale environments
outcomes: Faster investigations with automated person tracing
Reduced manpower costs for manual video review

projects.title: Stackenzo Camera-Based Person Tracking & Alert Platform
projects.desc: Real-time AI-powered person identification and tracking across distributed camera networks with automated alerts and response coordination.
projects.impact: Enables proactive security with real-time identification, multi-camera tracking, and instant alerting to nearest response units.
projects.fullDescription: Stackenzo AI-Powered Camera-Based Person Tracking and Alert Platform transforms traditional surveillance systems into proactive, AI-driven intelligence tools capable of identifying, tracking, and responding to person-centric events across distributed camera networks. Authorized personnel can upload an image of a person of interest, after which the system continuously scans live camera feeds to identify matches and trigger alerts when detections occur. The platform supports law enforcement agencies, public safety authorities, and institutional operators by enabling real-time awareness, automated alerts, and data-backed decision-making.
objectives: Enable real-time person identification across camera networks
Track individuals across multiple camera locations
Generate location-aware alerts with image evidence
Identify nearest response units automatically
Provide secure image upload and authorization controls
Maintain comprehensive audit logs for accountability
methodology: Deploy AI-based facial recognition on live camera feeds
Implement multi-camera tracking with location mapping
Create automated alert system with nearest unit identification
Optimize frame selection for scalable processing
Integrate role-based access and encrypted data handling
Build centralized operational dashboards
projects.teamSize: AI surveillance and public safety specialists
outcomes: Real-time identification of persons of interest
Instant alerts to nearest response units
